name: porygon-z
flavor_text: Additional software was installed to make it a better Pokémon. It began acting oddly, however.

moves.name: tackle
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: defense-curl
moves.effect: Raises user’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: conversion
moves.effect: User’s type changes to the type of one of its moves at random.

moves.name: recycle
moves.effect: User recovers the item it last used up.

moves.name: magnet-rise
moves.effect: User is immune to Ground moves and effects for five turns.

moves.name: thunder-shock
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: spark
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: conversion-2
moves.effect: Changes the user’s type to a random type either resistant or immune to the last move used against it.

moves.name: recover
moves.effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.

moves.name: discharge
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: tri-attack
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

moves.name: magic-coat
moves.effect: Reflects back the first effect move used on the user this turn.

moves.name: lock-on
moves.effect: Ensures that the user’s next move will hit the target.

moves.name: zap-cannon
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: aerial-ace
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: agility
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: ally-switch
moves.effect: User switches places with the friendly Pokémon opposite it.

moves.name: blizzard
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: charge
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Defense by one stage.  User’s Electric moves have doubled power next turn.

moves.name: charge-beam
moves.effect: Has a 70% chance to raise the user’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: confide
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: dark-pulse
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: double-edge
moves.effect: User receives 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.

moves.name: double-team
moves.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: dream-eater
moves.effect: Only works on sleeping Pokémon.  Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.

moves.name: eerie-impulse
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages.

moves.name: electroweb
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: embargo
moves.effect: Target cannot use held items.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: flash
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: foul-play
moves.effect: Calculates damage with the target’s attacking stat.

moves.name: frustration
moves.effect: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: gravity
moves.effect: Disables moves and immunities that involve flying or levitating for five turns.

moves.name: guard-swap
moves.effect: User swaps Defense and Special Defense changes with the target.

moves.name: hidden-power
moves.effect: Power and type depend upon user’s IVs.  Power can range from 30 to 70.

moves.name: hyper-beam
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: ice-beam
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: icy-wind
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: iron-tail
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: nasty-plot
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack by two stages.

moves.name: natural-gift
moves.effect: Power and type depend on the held berry.

moves.name: power-swap
moves.effect: User swaps Attack and Special Attack changes with the target.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: psybeam
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: psych-up
moves.effect: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.

moves.name: psychic
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: psyshock
moves.effect: Inflicts damage based on the target’s Defense, not Special Defense.

moves.name: rain-dance
moves.effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: return
moves.effect: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.

moves.name: round
moves.effect: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.

moves.name: secret-power
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to inflict a status effect which depends upon the terrain.

moves.name: shadow-ball
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: shock-wave
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: snore
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: solar-beam
moves.effect: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.

moves.name: speed-swap
moves.effect: Exchanges the user’s Speed with the target’s.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: sunny-day
moves.effect: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.

moves.name: swagger
moves.effect: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.

moves.name: swift
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: take-down
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: thief
moves.effect: Takes the target’s item.

moves.name: thunder
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: thunder-wave
moves.effect: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: thunderbolt
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: toxic
moves.effect: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.

moves.name: trick
moves.effect: User and target swap items.

moves.name: trick-room
moves.effect: For five turns, slower Pokémon will act before faster Pokémon.

moves.name: uproar
moves.effect: Forced to use this move for several turns.  Pokémon cannot fall asleep in that time.

moves.name: wonder-room
moves.effect: All Pokémon’s Defense and Special Defense are swapped for 5 turns.

moves.name: zen-headbutt
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: last-resort
moves.effect: Can only be used after all of the user’s other moves have been used.

moves.name: pain-split
moves.effect: Sets the user’s and targets’s HP to the average of their current HP.

moves.name: signal-beam
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: telekinesis
moves.effect: Moves have 100% accuracy against the target for three turns.

abilitiesDetailed.name: adaptability
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Increases the same-type attack bonus from 1.5× to 2×.

abilitiesDetailed.name: download
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Raises the attack stat corresponding to the opponents' weaker defense one stage upon entering battle.

abilitiesDetailed.name: analytic
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Strengthens moves to 1.3× their power when moving last.
